description: Ariadne P2 swarm eval — one labeled case per specialist agent plus a cross-cutting swarm case. Each case declares the gold expectations and per-metric thresholds the harness scores against. Gold values are grounded in the authoritative seed constants (app/seed/odyssey_patient.GOLDEN, app/seed/reference_data.REFERENCE_GOLDEN) and the reproducible live swarm outputs recorded in plan.md §19; the harness cross-checks the small literal gold in this file against those constants to prevent drift. `compare` is 'ge' (value >= threshold) unless noted; `live_only` metrics are skipped in the deterministic --offline run.

cases.description: TimelineAgent reconstructs a date-ordered longitudinal arc and surfaces the confirmed-diagnosis milestone; the narrative is citation-backed.

ConnectionsAgent ranks the differential from the deterministic phenotype overlap; the large-vessel pattern (Takayasu) must rank #1 (precision@1). HPO-recall is a secondary coverage metric against the full golden phenotype (symptom-derivable subset; observed live ~0.57 since lab/condition-encoded phenotypes are recovered by other signals). Every surfaced candidate is cited and free of assertive-diagnosis language.

TrialsAgent reproduces the golden eligibility partition (matches 001/002/003, rejects 004/005/006 incl. the paediatric age trap). Precision and recall of the eligible set are scored against the golden match set. Every surfaced match is cited and lint-clean.

SafetyAgent detects the three grounded signals for the hero (methotrexate+aspirin interaction, cumulative immunosuppressant stack, cross-prescriber iron duplication); detection recall is scored against that gold signal set. Every alert is cited and free of diagnosis language.

BriefingAgent's one-pager includes the confirmed-diagnosis milestone among its highlights, surfaces at least three cited open questions, and every backing finding is cited (derived only from cited memory).

JustifyAgent grounds the prior-auth request on the biologic (tocilizumab) for the most-recently-confirmed indication (Takayasu), assembles all four required elements, and every element is citation-backed. grounding_correctness scores the drug+indication selection; element_completeness scores the satisfied-element fraction.

Cross-cutting invariants over every item surfaced by the whole swarm: citation-coverage is 100% (any uncited finding is suppressed before it reaches this metric) and the suggestive agents (connections/trials/safety) emit zero assertive-diagnosis-language violations.
